summary: Good audience‑sourced mix captures a high‑energy Hartford 3/14/81 set with standout versions of Stella Blue, Peggy‑O and China Cat > Rider.
review: The recording delivers a solid, well‑balanced mix that lets Jerry’s guitar leap out while preserving the live ambience. The first set shines – Stella Blue (with its Bach tease), Peggy‑O, Sugaree and Lost/Saint are repeatedly praised – though several reviewers note the second set loses a bit of momentum. Overall fans consider this one of the better shows from the early ’81 tour.

ai_rating.rationale: 13 reviews, most giving 5 stars and highlighting strong performances and a good mix; only a few note a weaker second set, so the weighted average leans strongly positive.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Mix is described as great/clear with Jerry’s guitar prominent; no major drop‑outs or muffiness reported, and the tape still sounds good after decades.

standout_songs: China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider
show_quality.setlist_flow: First set is praised for high energy and tight jams; second set is described as hit‑or‑miss, with some feeling the band lost momentum after the opening numbers.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Consistently dialed‑in; guitar jumps out, Bach tease before Stella Blue noted.
